title: STEAM in Youth Work: Creative projects for young people

title: Play to Learn: Creating Educational Games for Youth Work
summary: A creative online workshop for youth workers who want to turn real issues from their practice into simple learning games using scarves, balls and easy, nature‑found materials. Each new game becomes a new question to explore with young people.

title: Ask Better, Teach Better: Question‑driven AI & advocacy in youth work
summary: A hands-on online workshop for youth workers to design better questions – for their groups and for AI. Using empathy maps, fishbone and “How might we…?” prompts, participants turn real needs into meaningful learning and concrete actions.

title: VR/AR - From Questions to Worlds: Interactive Story + Analog Game + AI Video Events
summary: Turn real issues from their youth work into interactive stories and low‑tech games. Using branching narratives, analog play and short AI‑generated videos, participants design questions that open dialogue and action.

title: Robotics in Youth Work: From Playful Missions to Real Skills
summary: An online workshop using simple examples and mission‑based design, participants learn how to use robots to develop teamwork, problem‑solving and creativity with young people – even with limited equipment.

title: Outdoor Paths: Designing Experiential Activities for Young People
